labels.license_unrar_text:
CBZ De'mey ZIP ngoqDe' lo', ngoqDe' notlh 'ej poSmoHlu'. CBR De'mey, wa'DIch, RAR ngoqDe' lo', ngoqDe' potlh.

MosaicView CBR De'mey poSmoHlaH UnRAR lo'taHvIS, RARlab chenmoHta' 'ej Dachaw'meH latlh chenmoHlu'laH.

Website: <https://www.rarlab.com/rar_add.htm>

help.title: MosaicView - lo'laHghach QIjmeH
help.intro: MosaicView comics (BD De'mey) per vo' nobmeH poQ tu'be'lu' choHmeH lo'laHghach nob. cham CBZ (ZIP), CBR (RAR) joq PDF Qor. ngoqDe' 64 bit patmey neH tu'lu'.
help.open_files_content:
• 'De' Hab' nob tIpSer ghap De' 'och chu'wI' tIqem
• cham Qorlu'bogh: CBZ, CBR, CB7, CBT, PDF, cha'nobmey (JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, GIF, ICO). EPUB De'mey poSmoH je laH, 'ach ngogh neH chenmoHlu' (mu'mey lughbe').
• PDF SIch'eghlu' (mIw luSov DaneH poSmeH): QaH ngeHlaHbe', Qagh quetlu'.
• PDF tIqmoH mach luSovlu' (owner password): ghItlhmey ngeHlu' motlh. MosaicView rar PDF QaH poSmoHlu' ngeH je'. pagh: Dochvam ghItlhbogh DoSmey Dub DaH (WEBP, TIFF, GIF, ICO…) QInmey CBZ/CBR ngo' DIvI' rurbe'bogh mI' lucher. 'ach MosaicView Dochmey pagh DaHjaj.
help.mosaic_content:
mozayIk QIn qaStaHvIS Hoch qonmey qIn thumbnail jangwI'. DaneH:
• qonmey choHmoH drag-drop lo' (qon mI' DIch automatic, 'ej mIw qon mI' chu' lo'lu'bogh lupoQ)
• law' qonmey DawIv (Ctrl+click pagh Shift+click)
• thumbnail ngaS choH slider lo'
• De'wI'mey pong choH manual pong click
• QIn De'wI'mey (CBZ/CBR/PDF) Windows Explorer vo' drag-drop laH latlh poSmoH QIn content ghom
help.manipulation_content:
• maqlegh pages reorder chaH drag-and-drop
• Hoch comic vay' merge chaH drag
• right-click page options lulegh (rotation, deletion, etc.)
• double-click page viewer poSmoH
• pages individual export windows folder drag, pagh ctrl+c / ctrl+v
help.renumber_content:
MosaicView cha' mI' choHqa'moH mIw noblu', mI' choHqa'moH QIp, ngo' menu (nIH QIp) ghap paQDI'norgh lupoQ:

• law' tetlh Sam'egh mIw (motlh mIw): ngoqDe' tetlh qoch'a' 'ay' jonlu' 'ej cha'logh, wejlogh tetlh je Sam. law' tetlh mI' choHqa'lu' (chay': cha'logh tetlh ponglu' 003-004, wejlogh 005-006-007). loSlogh tetlh law' law', wa'DIch pagh Qav mI' neH 'anglu' (chay': 010---025).

• nap mI' mIw: Hoch tetlh patlh mI' Hut je Suq (001, 002, 003...), tetlh qoch'a' buSbe'lu'.

cha' mIw choH, mI' choHqa'moH QIp nIH QIplu'. QIp leQ mIw lo'lu'bogh 'ang. mIw wIvlu'bogh, raD 'ej mejmoH mI' choHqa'lu' je lo'lu'.
help.flatten_content: per vo' puSmey tu'lu'chugh, 'vo'mey chuHmoH' lo' 'ej Hoch cha'nobmey wa' chen Daq yIvIH.
help.viewer_content:
ghItlh cha'logh yIbuS 'ej leghwI' yIpoS:
• qItmey ← → : ghItlhmey jotmeH
• qIt D : wej laD chamey cha'DIch choH
  - ghItlh wa': ghItlh wa' neH
  - cha' ghItlhmey: ghItlh wa' neH, ghItlhmey cha'-wej, loS-vagh, latlh
  - cha' ghItlhmey taH: ghItlh wa' neH, cha'-wej, wej-loS, loS-vagh, latlh
• ghom jojmey: jotmeH nom
• Ctrl+ghom pagh Ctrl+Plus/Minus: tIn ngo'
• Ctrl+0: tIn ngo' chu'moH
• qIt F11: Hoch SIrgh
• cha'logh buS: Hoch SIrgh choH
• qIt Échap: pe'meH mIvvo' bIHarghaH / leghwI' mej
help.join_pages_content: law' qonmey DawIv consecutive, nIH-click → 'qonmey selected ghom' qonmey horizontal pagh vertical ghom. nagh'Ij mIllogh chenmoHlu'bogh qonmey source mIllogh format rap 'e' luDelchugh Hoch, pagh PNG motlh.
help.split_pages_content:
cha' ghItlhmey motlh mobmeH:
• ghItlhmey moblu'bogh yIwIv
• nIH qIt → 'ghItlh mobmoH'
• He yIwIv (Dung-bIng pagh nIH-poS)
help.crop_content:
leghwI' Daq cha'nob Dung latlhmey yor yIchenmoH 'ej pe'meH Daq yIchoH:
• latlhmey yor ghom lo' yIchenmoH

• De'mey tab: ComicInfo.xml De' De'mey 'ang (per Daq tu'lu'chugh). De'mey ghaj comics Daq ghItlh chel pagh teq DaneHchugh, program ghItlhmey mI' choH qeS. latlh De'mey choHlaHbe'. ghu' ngoQ 'ej design wIv qep.

help.config_files_content:
MosaicView chenmoH .mosaicview_config.json pong. wIvmey law' vaj chu'moH tab po'lu'meH poQ 'e' ghaj pongvam, 'ej ngo'Daq poSmoHlu'pu'bogh qonmey tetlh 'e' ghaj 'e' ghaj, vaj ngo'Daq poSmoHlu'pu'bogh De'mey cha'meH poQ 'e' tu'lu'. MosaicView poH Daq De'mey je choq, vaj cha'nob vangmeH pat'a' poQmeH tu'lu'.
{temp_dir} QuS'a'-Daq tu'lu' De'mey Hoch.
qawHaq SoQmoH rej poH Daq De'mey lan, 'ach .mosaicview_config.json De'-Daq tu'lu'meH chenmoHta'pu', pagh Dotlh ghaj.
toH, {temp_dir} QuS'a'-Daq ghoS pagh tabmey bIngDaq DuQmeH De'mey Hoch chImpu'lu'laH. qawHaq poSmey rej .mosaicview_config.json De' chu'ta'lu'laH, 'ej poQmeH poH Daq De'mey chu'ta'lu'laH.

qawHaq chu' poSmeH chu'ta'lu'laH.
help.language_content:
MosaicView pat Hol law' tu'lu'.
HoS'a'Daq, qawHaq vItlhutlh pat mIw Hol 'ej Hol Dol ghaj chaq. Hol lo'laHbe'chugh mIw, English lo' Hal.
pItlh ghopDu'wIjmo' Hol choHlaH, tabmey tlhegh bIngDaq pup tetlh lo', mach cha'nob tInghach lIqtabHom bIngDaq. DuH Dagh'eghlu'pu' 'ej lo'lu' vaj qawHaq qal.
HOL LAH: Arabic, Armenian, Bulgarian, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Irish, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Malay, Maltese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swedish, Tamil, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese.
QI'yaH HOL LAH: tlhIngan (ghItlh latin ghItlh pIqaD joq), edhel Hol Sindarin (ghItlh latin ghItlh tengwar joq), edhel Hol Quenya (ghItlh latin ghItlh tengwar joq).

De'wI'Hom vaj Windows Qolqo'mey lo', pIqaD (tlhIngan Hol) joq tengwar (Ho'elI' Hol: Sindarin joq Quenya) Qolqo'mey neH. Qolqo'mey vaj tu'be' chutmey 'ej Daq vaj vo':
- pIqaD vaD (tlhIngan Hol ghItlh): {url_piqad}
- tengwar vaD (Ho'elI' ghItlh, Sindarin joq Quenya vaD): {url_tengwar}
Qo'mey vaj taH ghobe'chugh, pIqaD joq tengwar Qolqo'mey Suq DaneH, bIngDaq tab yIbuS:

french Hol ghItlhwI' qawHaq. Hol law' mughlu'pu' AI lo', Claude pong. Hol loSmaH lo' vIHar. 'ach Hol Hoch jatlhbe' jIH. vaj AI lo' DuH tu'be'lu', mughwI'pu' loSmaH vatlh ghel je qonta'lu' potlhghach 'e' tu'be'lu'be'mo'. motlh mughmeH Dotlh mo', Qagh tu'lu' chaq. vaj jIQeQ.
help.credits_content: De'wI'Hommey vIjatlhbe'. pagh vIjatlh. Qel vIchenmoHpu' Claude lo', Anthropic AI, Claude Code pong. Claude Code yISuq, Qel wov!
help.resize_pages_content:
qonmey reduction pagh enlargement:
• wa' pagh law' qonmey DawIv
• nIH-click → 'resize'
• wej options available:
  - custom dimensions: desired width pagh height enter (aspect ratio automatically preserved).
  - percentage reduction: 10% vo' 90% percentage DawIv
  - percentage enlargement: 10% vo' 100% percentage DawIv
• application ngogh estimated size modification qaSpu' cha'
• modification law'taHghach selected qonmey Hoch applies
help.icons_content:
Hoch mIqta'mey lo'lu'bogh qach QaD Dochvam DaH 'ej Dalo'laH wa' QaD: https://www.freepik.com/author/juicy-fish/icons/juicy-fish-sketchy_908#from_element=resource_detail
vagh mIwmey vIchenmoHta'.
wav Del neH, Windows chavmoH De' Del, chenmoHpu' jIH ('ach AI lo', jIH cha'nob chenmoHwI' vaj Qugh ḥafna, ḥafna, ḥafna). Del vaj lo' chut qaH, chanvo' DaqeS bIneH.
help.split_ui_content:
MosaicView chaw' cha' ghomDu' leghlaHmeH, chuqDaq.

Sep nIS Split nap reH cha' ghom wIv. ghom'e' wa' ghom reH: ghom wIv, ghom choH, ghom mev je. ghom HoS nap SuD nap wIv.

ghom ghomDu' chenmoH, baH'egh. Hoch ghomDu' wIv chaw' reH. ghomDu' vItu' Duj DoS Doq.

Sep nIS Close cha' ghom nap wa' ghom.

ghItlh bIng cha' mIw polmeH De'wI' mIw nIHDaq raIta'. cha' chen mIwDaq paneli tIn nIHDaq rehtë (50/50).
help.config_clipboard_note: pagh: Windows ghItlhmeH De tetlh lo'lu'bogh poH De (clipboard_XXXXX De tetlh) 12 rep chen, vaj De tetlh lInglaH DaneH'a' programa' Dachavta'DI' je. 12 rep pagh, De tetlh teq.
help.config_log_note: ngoq choH (PDF choH CBZ CBR choH CBZ je) Qagh lutu'chugh Qagh ghItlh chen. ghItlh De (Log_pdftocbz_.txt Log_cbrtocbz_.txt je) taH qaSpa' programa' SoQmoH. "poH De teq" laDmeH patlh neH luteqlu'.
help.adjust_images_content: Hoch mIllogh tI'laH DIvI' MosaicView. wov, Hurgh, tIn, gham, poch, SuqlaH (qIj-chIS, sepya, rIt je), compression tI', rIt teq, wovmoH, pagh rar yIqaD. vaj Viewer tu'lu' 'ej rar qabDaq legh. mIlloghHom leghlaH reH.
help.create_icon_content:
MosaicView vItlhutlh icon file (.ico) chenmoH mosaic Hoch mIllogh.
• nIH-click mIllogh → 'Icon chenmoH'
• viewer-Daq Dap DaHev (icon tetraghtaH)
• transparency DapoQchugh yInab
• yIchel: .ico file mosaic-Daq baHta'
• .ico files Hoch standard resolution (16×16 256×256 vItlhutlh) automated chenmoH
• .ico file mosaic-Daq poQ, CBZ archive-Daq ngeH blocked, ICO format archive Hoch Subbe'. .ico file chu' export (Ctrl+C Windows folder-Daq yIchu'), vaj mosaic-Daq yImev ngeH.
help.batch_convert_content:
MosaicView lIngwI' vagh batch mI' chenmoH, 'ej neH ngoq tIn Huj. wa' Hoch ghu': waw' wIv, chaw', qagh, qeq. ngoq permanent mej.
• CBR → CBZ: Hoch CBR (RAR) ngoq waw' 'ej ngoq ghaj. CBR ZIP, 7z joq TAR 'e' neH, ngoq essë (.cbz, .cb7 joq .cbt) chaw' pagh. ngoq essë 'ej raxë nurner.
• CB7 → CBZ: Hoch CB7 (7-Zip) ngoq waw' 'ej ngoq ghaj. CB7 ZIP, RAR joq TAR 'e' neH, ngoq essë (.cbz, .cbr joq .cbt) chaw' pagh. ngoq essë 'ej raxë nurner.
• CBT → CBZ: Hoch CBT (TAR) ngoq waw' 'ej ngoq ghaj. CBT ZIP, RAR joq 7z 'e' neH, ngoq essë (.cbz, .cbr joq .cb7) chaw' pagh. ngoq essë 'ej raxë nurner.
• PDF → CBZ: Hoch PDF ngoq waw' 'ej ngoq ghaj. ngoq mej pagh.
• ngoq → CBZ: CBZ wa' Hoch ngoq waw' 'ej ngoq ghaj. ngoq Huj, raxë, parmë (TIFF) joq lúmë (GIF) nurner.
help.icon_toolbar_content: Icon toolbar-Daq tIn Qu' De' lI' qach latlh jatlh. bIje'laH icon-mey reH toolbar-Daq 'ach SoH neH. icon-mey Dalegh pagh Dabel 'e' DamaS net chaw'meH, gear button toolbar-Daq bIH 'ej SoH: configuration window poSmoH, Daj icon-mey toolbar lIH je puS buS mej. « + » « − » je button-mey lo' icon-mey'e' nI' je. configuration automatically choHlu'.
help.nfo_editor_content:
NFO-qawHaq 'oH ghItlh qawHaq'e' (.nfo De'wI' mIwDaj) 'ej lo'lu' archiv De' choqmeH: QIn, paq, De'mey…

NFO-qawHaq chenmoHmeH, lo' tancDaq Dun tancDaj, paq-lIst, pagh comhad-lIst (moSaIq nIHDaq pagh chos). ngoQ tu'lu' neH moSaIq nampDaq 'oHbe'chugh. pong yInob 'ej QIn yInob: qawHaq coivë moSaIqDaq, chu'moHlu'be'chugh pagh choqbe'lu'.

NFO-qawHaq jev tISaHmeH, moSaIqDaq chen chen. mIw poSmoH urë-carwa pong 'ej QIn, nati tISaHlaH. wa' mIwDaq je, ngoQ notta' harna-QIn-lIstDaq.
help.metadata_content:
MosaicView ComicVine De'wI'mey qaw vIlo' (pongmey, SepHom, mIw, ghItlhwI'pu', mu'mey...) ComicVine De'wI'vo' - ghom qaw veS.

Mód wa': SoQ comics, ghIq toolbar pong o Metadata menu lo'. cha' pong tIr: wa'DIch SepHom wIv, ghIq episod wIv. De' mung qaw ComicInfo.xml qon.

Mód batch: tay' folder(mey) bach ar "De' mung qaw teywI' pagh", o toolbar pong o Metadata menu lo'. Tir quë file (CBZ, CBR, CB7, CBT, PDF). Files ar CBZ cárë CBZ épa De' mung qaw.

API tI: ComicVine API tI lemya. App vIlo' tIr. comicvine.gamespot.com conta épa ista.

API HoS: ComicVine HoS, ar umir.
• 200 petitioni quë resurs quë rep. I limita, ghIq cari nar.
• 100 resultati quë petitioni, ista quë episodmey SepHom.
• 1 petitioni quë lup. MosaicView caita 2 lup quë petitioni, ar raita petitioni nar HoS.

De'wI' gholwI' {scraper} chen'eghmoHlu'bogh vIlo' naQ.

1. web mIllogh DapoS 'e' yInID
2. 'mIllogh yIqIp' DawIv
3. MosaicView-Daq, 'poS' wuq ghap Ctrl+V yIlo'

mIllogh Hoch web mIllogh chenmoH!
